summary: Chatbot Bank Withdrawal OTP Flow Testing - All tests passed. Backend APIs (40/40) and Frontend E2E tests (38/38) verified. Eko OTP verification flow working correctly in preview environment (returns skip_otp due to IP whitelist). Chatbot UI correctly detects bank withdrawal intent, shows Start Bank Withdrawal button, and opens ChatbotWithdrawalFlow modal.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tests use existing test user credentials 9876543210/123456
context_for_next_testing_agent:
## Chatbot Bank Withdrawal OTP Flow Tests Complete

### Features Verified:
1. **Chatbot UI**:
   - Opens with welcome message after login
   - Bank withdrawal intent detection working (triggers on 'Bank withdrawal करायचे')
   - Start Bank Withdrawal button appears correctly
   - ChatbotWithdrawalFlow modal opens with proper steps indicator
   - Voice controls visible (microphone, volume toggle)
   - Chatbot can be opened/closed

2. **Eko OTP APIs**:
   - /api/chatbot-redeem/eko/check-customer - Returns skip_otp:true in preview (IP not whitelisted)
   - /api/chatbot-redeem/eko/verify-otp - Works with bypass in preview
   - /api/chatbot-redeem/eko/resend-otp - Endpoint functional
   - /api/chatbot-redeem/eko/verification-status/{mobile} - Returns verification status

3. **Withdrawal APIs**:
   - Fee calculation: ₹10 flat + 20% admin charge
   - Minimum ₹500 enforced
   - PRC to INR rate: 10:1
   - Request validation (IFSC format, account number digits)
   - Admin stats/pending/all endpoints

4. **Bank Details Validation**:
   - IFSC code format validation (XXXX0XXXXXX)
   - Account number must be numeric
   - Account holder name required

### Test Files:
- Backend: /app/backend/tests/test_chatbot_withdrawal.py (40 tests)
- Frontend: /app/tests/e2e/chatbot-withdrawal.spec.ts (20 tests)
- Frontend: /app/tests/e2e/chatbot-withdrawal-flow.spec.ts (18 tests)

### Note:
- Eko APIs return skip_otp in preview environment because IP 34.170.12.145 is not whitelisted in Eko portal
- Full OTP flow requires production testing with whitelisted IP
- Test user 9876543210 does not have KYC verified, so eligibility check shows 'Cannot Proceed'
